prompt: A bright, cheerful summer co-branded beverage poster in a clean Chinese commercial advertising style, showing a collaboration between {argument name="brand one" default="蜜雪冰城"} and {argument name="brand two" default="STARBUCKS"}. Vertical poster layout with a soft blue sky background, sunlit greenery, and an outdoor cafe atmosphere. At the top, place both brand logos side by side with a large bold Chinese headline in playful hand-drawn display lettering: {argument name="headline text" default="雪王遇见星朋友"}. Beneath it, add a green ribbon banner with Chinese subheadline text: {argument name="subheadline text" default="米雪冰城 × 星巴克 联名开启"}, and a smaller line reading "甜蜜加倍·快乐翻倍". Include 2 circular stamp-style graphics: one on the left reading "联名限定", and one on the upper right like a postmark with Chinese text around a small drink icon. In the center foreground on a wooden outdoor table, display 2 iced drinks: on the left, a tall clear cup of vivid green matcha slush topped with a tall swirl of vanilla soft serve and green matcha drizzle, with visible ice texture and a cute snowman mascot logo on the cup; on the right, a tall clear Starbucks-style iced latte with milk and green matcha swirls at the bottom, topped with whipped cream and dark cookie crumbs, with the green siren logo on the cup. In front of the drinks, place 1 cute white snowman mascot figurine with a tiny crown, round body, rosy cheeks, red cape, and a happy wink, sitting and holding a small takeaway coffee cup. Add 2 vertical product name tags beside the drinks: left tag "雪顶抹茶星冰乐", right tag "抹茶雪王奥利奥". On the right midground, place 1 small black chalkboard sign on a wooden easel reading "ICE CREAM & COFFEE" with chalk drawings of an ice cream cone and a takeaway cup. In the lower left, create a torn-paper price block showing a combo offer with large red numbers "¥19.9", green supporting text, and a small green badge reading "立省 ¥6". In the lower center-right, add a "联名周边" area displaying exactly 4 merchandise items: 1 cup sleeve, 1 character keychain or acrylic charm, 1 round badge, and 1 small sticker or token, all using the snowman mascot and coffee collaboration theme. Use warm sunlight, glossy drink photography, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh trees, high contrast product retouching, crisp packaging details, and an upbeat youthful retail-promo aesthetic. Include scattered doodle hearts and playful decorative accents around the typography. Keep all visible text in Chinese except the Starbucks wordmark and the chalkboard text.
translatedPrompt: 一张明亮欢快的夏季联名饮品海报，采用简洁的中国商业广告风格，展示 {argument name="brand one" default="蜜雪冰城"} 与 {argument name="brand two" default="STARBUCKS"} 的联名合作。竖版海报布局，背景为柔和的蓝天、阳光下的绿植和户外咖啡馆氛围。海报顶部并排放置两个品牌 Logo，下方配有醒目的大号中文标题，采用俏皮的手绘艺术字体：{argument name="headline text" default="雪王遇见星朋友"}。标题下方添加一条绿色丝带横幅，内含中文副标题：{argument name="subheadline text" default="蜜雪冰城 × 星巴克 联名开启"}，以及一行小字“甜蜜加倍·快乐翻倍”。包含 2 个圆形印章式图形：左侧印有“联名限定”，右上角类似邮戳，周围环绕中文并带有小型饮品图标。画面中心前景的户外木桌上放置 2 杯冰饮：左侧是一杯高透明杯装的鲜绿色抹茶冰沙，顶部有高耸的香草软冰淇淋和绿色抹茶淋酱，冰块质感清晰，杯身印有可爱的雪王吉祥物 Logo；右侧是一杯高透明的星巴克风冰拿铁，底部有牛奶和绿色抹茶旋涡，顶部覆盖鲜奶油和深色饼干碎，杯身印有绿色美人鱼 Logo。饮品前方放置 1 个可爱的白色雪王吉祥物玩偶，戴着小皇冠，圆滚滚的身体，红润的脸颊，披着红斗篷，俏皮地眨着眼，坐着并手持一个小咖啡外带杯。在饮品旁添加 2 个竖排产品标签：左侧标签为“雪顶抹茶星冰乐”，右侧标签为“抹茶雪王奥利奥”。右侧中景处放置 1 个木质画架上的黑色小黑板，上面写着“ICE CREAM & COFFEE”，并用粉笔画有冰淇淋甜筒和外带杯。左下角设计一个撕纸风格的价格板块，显示组合优惠，配有醒目的红色数字“¥19.9”、绿色辅助文字以及一个写着“立省 ¥6”的小型绿色徽章。右下方添加一个“联名周边”展示区，精确陈列 4 件周边商品：1 个杯套、1 个角色钥匙扣或亚克力挂件、1 个圆形徽章和 1 个小贴纸或代币，均采用雪王吉祥物与咖啡联名主题。画面运用温暖阳光、光泽感饮品摄影、浅景深效果、柔和的树影虚化、高对比度产品修图、清晰的包装细节，呈现出积极向上的年轻化零售促销美学。在文字周围点缀零星的涂鸦爱心和俏皮的装饰元素。除 Starbucks 字标和黑板文字外，其余可见文字均保持为中文。

breakdown.creativeCore: 夏季咖啡冰淇淋联名海报：此提示词可生成明亮的中国风联名饮品广告海报，适用于零售促销、社交媒体推广或菜单新品视觉展示。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: poster layout, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
